news.t: Small-Cap Stocks Are Crushing the S&P 500. Here Are 4 Active ETFs to Play the Rally.

holdings.infoBox: AVSC is an equity ETF with a total of 1539 individual holdings. The top holdings are MYR Group stock at 0.57%, Viasat at 0.52%, Viavi Solutions at 0.48%, Dana Incorporated at 0.45%, and SSC GOVERNMENT MM GVMXX at 0.44%.

overview.description: The Avantis U.S Small Cap Equity ETF (AVSC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 2000 index. The fund is an actively-managed portfolio of US small-cap value companies selected based on fundamental criteria. AVSC was launched on Jan 11, 2022 and is issued by American Century Investments.

data.title: Small-Cap Stocks Are Crushing the S&P 500. Here Are 4 Active ETFs to Play the Rally.
data.text: It's a small world after all. Small-caps stocks, that is.

data.title: Navigating the Small-Cap ETF Disconnect
data.text: There has been a visible disparity between the performance of U.S. small-caps and U.S. large-caps so far this year. What hasn't been too visible is a lot of investor interest in the action.

data.title: 3 ETFs for a Small-Cap Revival
data.text: These ETFs will soar if small-cap stocks roar back. These ETFs will soar if small-cap stocks roar back.

data.title: 4 ETFs to Consider From an Undervalued Part of the Market
data.text: And what to look for when shopping for one.
